strengths: Strong action verbs throughout experience bullets
Good quantification of achievements (2M+ events/hour, 500+ customers, 35% cost reduction)
Clear career progression from Engineer to Staff
Well-organized standard sections that are ATS-friendly
Technical skills section is comprehensive and relevant

weaknesses.issue: Summary is generic and doesn't highlight unique value proposition or specific domain expertise
weaknesses.suggestion: Lead with your strongest differentiator — e.g., 'Platform engineer specializing in real-time event processing systems at enterprise scale'

weaknesses.issue: Missing business impact metrics on the multi-tenant isolation work
weaknesses.suggestion: Add customer satisfaction or uptime metrics if available, e.g., 'supporting 500+ enterprise customers with 99.99% isolation guarantee'

weaknesses.issue: Bullets lack outcome/impact — 'Collaborated with data science team' doesn't show what was achieved
weaknesses.suggestion: Rewrite to show impact: 'Deployed ML model serving infrastructure reducing inference latency from [X]ms to [Y]ms'

weaknesses.issue: Skills are listed flat without categorization, making it harder to scan
weaknesses.suggestion: Consider grouping into categories: Languages, Frameworks, Infrastructure, Databases

improved_bullets.original: Led migration of monolithic application to microservices, reducing deployment cycles from weekly to daily
improved_bullets.improved: Led architectural migration from monolith to microservices, accelerating deployment frequency from weekly to daily releases and improving system reliability by [X%]

improved_bullets.original: Collaborated with data science team to deploy ML model serving infrastructure
improved_bullets.improved: Deployed ML model serving infrastructure in collaboration with data science team, enabling real-time predictions for [number] models serving [number] requests/day

improved_bullets.original: Built full-stack features using React and Node.js for a SaaS analytics platform
improved_bullets.improved: Engineered full-stack analytics features using React and Node.js, driving [X%] increase in user engagement on the SaaS platform
